seoTitle: Erina vs Ermington — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Erina and Ermington. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Erina and Ermington.
heading: Erina vs Ermington — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Erina, New South Wales and Ermington, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Erina has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Ermington (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Erina or Ermington safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Erina has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Ermington scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Erina scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Ermington scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Erina or Ermington?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Erina has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
